summary.business_type: Local Service — Brick-and-mortar Kindergarten/Preschool (Karaj, Alborz, Iran)
top_findings: llms.txt missing — AI crawlers can't understand site structure
About page has placeholder TODO text — not real content
No published news/blog content — zero fresh content signal
No Google Business Profile verified or referenced
postalCode empty in NAP and schema
quick_wins: Delete stale create-next-app SVGs from /public (2 min)
Add mobile phone to LocalBusiness schema (5 min)
Add WhatsApp to sameAs in schema (5 min)
Fix empty postalCode in business.ts (2 min)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt correct with AI bot allowlist
Dynamic XML sitemap with fixed BUILD_DATE
Full security headers (HSTS, nosniff, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)

findings.title: No Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: CSP is absent from next.config.ts. Without it, XSS attacks can inject arbitrary scripts.
findings.recommendation: Add CSP header to securityHeaders array in next.config.ts. Allow 'self', 'unsafe-inline' for scripts, openstreetmap.org for frames.

findings.title: llms.txt missing
findings.description: /public/llms.txt does not exist. AI search platforms use this to understand site structure.
findings.recommendation: Create public/llms.txt with H1 summary and Markdown links to all key pages.

findings.title: Stale create-next-app SVGs in /public
findings.description: file.svg, globe.svg, next.svg, vercel.svg, window.svg are unused but publicly accessible.
findings.recommendation: Delete these 5 files.

findings.title: Framer Motion not using LazyMotion
findings.description: framer-motion ~104KB is in dependencies. If imported directly, it loads on every page.
findings.recommendation: If unused, remove the package. If used, switch to LazyMotion + m + domAnimation.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: All copy in Farsi — correct for target audience
Good program descriptions with age ranges
Enrollment form captures all parent/child fields

findings.title: About page has placeholder TODO text
findings.description: Real kindergarten story/history is not written. A TODO comment in the source marks the placeholder.
findings.recommendation: Owner to provide: founding year, team size, capacity, story. Replace generic template paragraph.

findings.title: Meta descriptions thin or generic
findings.description: About page meta: 34 chars. All pages use short, generic descriptions without local keywords.
findings.recommendation: Write unique 120-160 char meta descriptions per page with local keywords (کرج, جهانشهر).

findings.title: No published news content
findings.description: News page is empty. Zero fresh content = no crawl frequency signal and no long-tail coverage.
findings.recommendation: Publish 3-5 posts via /admin/news/new. Topics: facility events, child development tips, program announcements.

findings.title: Gallery empty
findings.description: Gallery page has no photos. Parents researching childcare heavily rely on facility photos.
findings.recommendation: Upload 8-12 photos of classrooms, outdoor space, activities via /admin/gallery.

findings.title: No staff profiles
findings.description: Staff grid is hidden (DB empty). Staff bios build E-E-A-T for a childcare business.
findings.recommendation: Add 3-5 staff members with name, role, photo, bio via /admin/staff/new.

findings.title: No breadcrumb navigation
findings.description: Program detail pages only have a text back-link. No breadcrumb trail for Google sitelinks.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList schema + visible breadcrumb component on program pages and news posts.

findings.title: Homepage H1 misses geo keywords
findings.description: H1: 'جایی امن و شاد برای رشد...' is emotional but misses 'مهدکودک کرج' keyword.
findings.recommendation: Consider: 'مهدکودک آرشین — محیطی امن و شاد در کرج' or add geo mention to subtitle.

findings.title: postalCode empty string in schema
findings.description: postalCode: '' outputs invalid empty string in JSON-LD. Google may flag this.
findings.recommendation: Set real 10-digit postal code in business.ts, or ensure the || undefined fallback works.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList schema
findings.description: Inner pages have no breadcrumb structured data — missed rich result opportunity.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to program detail pages and news posts.

findings.title: WhatsApp missing from sameAs
findings.description: business.socials.whatsapp is set but not included in localBusinessSchema sameAs array.
findings.recommendation: Add whatsapp to the sameAs filter in lib/seo.tsx.

findings.title: Mobile phone not in schema
findings.description: Schema only lists landline. Mobile +989190333553 is displayed on site but absent from JSON-LD.
findings.recommendation: Add business.mobile to telephone in localBusinessSchema.

findings.title: No BlogPosting schema on news posts
findings.description: News post pages have no structured data markup.
findings.recommendation: Add BlogPosting schema to app/(site)/news/[slug]/page.tsx.

findings.title: Framer Motion bundle impact
findings.description: framer-motion ~104KB in dependencies. If not using LazyMotion, loads on every page first paint.
findings.recommendation: Remove if unused, or implement LazyMotion + domAnimation.

findings.title: OpenStreetMap iframe performance
findings.description: iframe loads third-party JS/CSS on contact page. loading=lazy is set (good) but still a network dependency.
findings.recommendation: Wrap in IntersectionObserver reveal if CLS/LCP is impacted. Current lazy loading is adequate.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: robots.txt allows all major AI crawlers
LocalBusiness JSON-LD gives structured facts for AI extraction

findings.title: llms.txt missing
findings.description: No llms.txt. AI platforms use this to understand site structure. Required per CLAUDE.md §8.
findings.recommendation: Create public/llms.txt with Farsi summary + Markdown links to all key pages.

findings.title: About page lacks citable facts
findings.description: AI models cite specific facts (founding year, capacity, ratios). Current about page has none.
findings.recommendation: Add factual claims: founding year, capacity, teacher:child ratio, certifications.

findings.title: Entity signals weak
findings.description: Schema has @id but no legalName, foundingDate, or numberOfEmployees.
findings.recommendation: Add these to localBusinessSchema() when owner provides data.

findings.title: Stale SVGs in /public
findings.description: 5 unused SVGs from create-next-app scaffold remain in /public.
findings.recommendation: Delete: file.svg, globe.svg, next.svg, vercel.svg, window.svg

findings.title: OG image text is Latin-only
findings.description: opengraph-image.tsx uses Latin text only (Persian font rendering limitation). Documented limitation.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable limitation. Could be replaced with a static 1200x630 JPEG with Persian text if desired.

categories.name: Local SEO
what_works: NAP from single source (business.ts) — consistent everywhere

findings.title: No Google Business Profile
findings.description: GBP is the #1 local ranking signal for brick-and-mortar businesses. Not verified/referenced.
findings.recommendation: Claim/verify GBP for 'مهدکودک آرشین' at maps.google.com (use VPN from Iran).

findings.title: postalCode missing
findings.description: Empty postalCode weakens NAP citation consistency and local schema.
findings.recommendation: Add real 10-digit Iranian postal code to business.ts.

findings.title: Mobile phone not in schema telephone field
findings.description: Only landline in schema. Mobile shown on site but not in JSON-LD.
findings.recommendation: Add to LocalBusiness schema telephone array.

findings.title: No local geo keywords in page copy
findings.description: Body text doesn't mention کرج or جهانشهر — only in address field.
findings.recommendation: Add 'در جهانشهر کرج' to homepage subtitle or about page intro.

phases.name: Phase 1: Quick Wins (This Week)
items: Create public/llms.txt
Delete 5 stale SVGs from /public
Add mobile phone + WhatsApp to LocalBusiness schema
Fix postalCode in business.ts (get real code from owner)
Add local keyword 'کرج' to homepage subtitle
Fix Framer Motion: remove or switch to LazyMotion

phases.name: Phase 2: Content (Weeks 2-3)
items: Owner writes real About page content
Publish 3-5 news posts via admin CMS
Upload gallery photos (8-12 images)
Add staff profiles (3-5 members)
Write unique meta descriptions for all pages
Add BreadcrumbList schema to program + news pages

phases.name: Phase 3: Authority & Local (Month 2)
items: Claim/verify Google Business Profile (VPN required from Iran)
Add BlogPosting schema to news post template
Add CSP header to next.config.ts
Add factual citable content to About page
Collect and display customer reviews

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitor & Iterate
items: Check PageSpeed Insights from non-Iranian IP after each deploy
Publish news posts monthly
Monitor Vercel deployment logs for errors
Check sitemap in Google Search Console after GBP verified
